releases.title: collectZ v3.4.132
releases.summary: This patch proves the Plex watched-state writeback contract before enabling any real app-driven Plex mutation.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.131
releases.summary: This patch adds a safe Plex rating readback apply path for existing collectZ rows.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.130
releases.summary: This patch adds an opt-in Plex watched-state refresh scheduler for existing Plex-linked collectZ rows.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.129
releases.summary: This patch adds the first explicit Plex watched-state apply path for existing collectZ rows.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.128
releases.summary: This patch adds the read-only Plex watch-state sync contract that future watched/progress automation will build on.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.127
releases.summary: This patch makes saved Plex webhook receivers visible again after refresh without exposing the raw receiver token.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.126
releases.summary: This patch lets collectZ automatically process queued Plex `library.new` webhook import hints on a lightweight backend cadence.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.125
releases.summary: This patch processes queued Plex `library.new` webhook import hints by fetching the single PMS metadata item and running it through the existing Plex import path.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.124
releases.summary: This patch lets Plex `library.new` webhooks create a safe import hint job without silently running a full Plex import.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.123
releases.summary: This patch adds Plex webhook receiver administration. Admins can generate, rotate, and revoke a receiver URL for Plex webhooks while the receiver remains contract-only.
